question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately produced a full worked solution in Turn 1 with no engagement of the user at any decision point.

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all — the Pair never surfaced the interesting forks (e.g., 'and' rule for British English, hyphens/spaces handling, recursive vs. closed-form decomposition).

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no progressive questioning. The full answer (21,124) and derivation are dumped in one go, which is the maximum spoiler.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is clear and the math is well-presented, but the 'conversation' is essentially a monologue followed by the user/Pair self-congratulating. There's no genuine back-and-forth.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
